message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Interactions between the Control Plane (master node) and the Worker Node

skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam legendStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
    LifeLineBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
    LifeLineBorderColor #CCCCCC
    ArrowColor #333333
    ArrowThickness 1
}

' Define colors based on legend
skinparam participant {
    BackgroundColor<<ControlPlane>> #D6EAF8
    BorderColor<<ControlPlane>> #2E86C1
    BackgroundColor<<WorkerNode>> #D5F5E3
    BorderColor<<WorkerNode>> #27AE60
    BackgroundColor<<PowerManagerSetup>> #FADBD8
    BorderColor<<PowerManagerSetup>> #C0392B
    BackgroundColor<<PowerManagerConfig>> #FDEBD0
    BorderColor<<PowerManagerConfig>> #D35400
    BackgroundColor<<PowerManagerDeploy>> #F9E79F
    BorderColor<<PowerManagerDeploy>> #F1C40F
}

legend right
|<back:#D6EAF8> Control Plane - Master Node</back>|
|<back:#D5F5E3> Worker Node</back>|
|<back:#FADBD8> Power Manager System Setup</back>|
|<back:#FDEBD0> Power Manager Configuration</back>|
|<back:#F9E79F> Power Manager Deployment</back>|
endlegend

actor "Georgina" as Georgina
participant "API-Server" as APIServer <<ControlPlane>>
participant "etcd" as etcd <<ControlPlane>>
participant "Controller Manager" as CM <<ControlPlane>>
participant "Scheduler" as Scheduler <<ControlPlane>>
participant "Power Operator" as PowerOp <<ControlPlane>>
participant "Kubelet" as Kubelet <<WorkerNode>>
participant "Power Node Agent" as PNA <<WorkerNode>>
participant "Power Optimization Library" as POL <<WorkerNode>>
participant "K8s Objects" as K8s <<WorkerNode>>
participant "Kube-Proxy" as KubeProxy <<WorkerNode>>

== Kubernetes Initialization ==
Georgina -> APIServer: 1 kubectl create -f pod.yaml
APIServer ->> etcd: 2 save new state
etcd --> APIServer: 3 check for changes
APIServer ->> CM: 4 watch for unassigned pods(s)
APIServer ->> Scheduler: 5 notify about pod w nodename=""
Scheduler ->> APIServer: 6 assign pod to node
APIServer ->> etcd: 7 save new state
etcd --> APIServer: 8 look for newly assigned pod(s)
APIServer ->> Kubelet: 9 bind pod to node
Kubelet ->> PNA: 10 start container
Kubelet ->> APIServer: 11 update pod status
APIServer ->> etcd: 12 save new state

== Power Manager Initialization ==
Georgina -> KubeProxy: 1 Ensure correct proxy configuration
Georgina -> Kubelet: 2 Confirm CPU Manager policy
note right of Kubelet: cpuManagerPolicy = "static"
Georgina -> Kubelet: 3 Reserve System CPUs
note right of Kubelet: reservedSystemCPUs = "0"
Georgina -> K8s: 4 Create Namespace
note right of K8s: apply config/rbac/namespace.yaml
Georgina -> K8s: 5 Create RBAC and Service Accounts
note right of K8s: apply config/rbac/rbac.yaml
Georgina -> K8s: 6 Create CRDs
note right of K8s: make
Georgina -> K8s: 7 Label nodes
note right of K8s: label node <NODE_NAME> feature.node.kubernetes.io/power-node="true"

== Power Manager Deployment ==
Georgina -> K8s: 1 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of K8s: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
Georgina -> POL: 2 Deploy the config
note right of POL: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
Georgina -> POL: 3 Set Shared Profile
note right of POL: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
Georgina -> POL: 4 Deploy th Workload
note right of POL: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
Georgina -> POL: 5 Deploy Pod
note right of POL: examples/example-pod.yaml

== Power Manager additional functionality ==

group Uncore
    Georgina -> Kubelet: 1 Confirm Kernel version
    note right of Kubelet: kernel 5.6+ required for uncore
    Georgina -> POL: 2 Set Freq in Die and Pkg
    note right of POL: examples/example-uncore
    Georgina -> K8s: 3 Deploy Controller Manager
    note right of K8s: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: 4 Deploy the config
    note right of POL: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: 5 Set Shared Profile
    note right of POL: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: 6 Deploy th Workload
    note right of POL: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: 7 Deploy Pod
    note right of POL: examples/example-pod.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: 8 Set Time of Day functionality
    note right of POL: examples/example-timeofday
end

group P-State
    Georgina -> K8s: 1 Deploy Controller Manager
    note right of K8s: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: 2 Deploy the config
    note right of POL: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: 3 Set Shared Profile\nand configure the P-State governor
    note right of POL: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: 4 Deploy th Workload
    note right of POL: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: 5 Deploy Pod
    note right of POL: examples/example-pod.yaml
end

group C-State
    Georgina -> K8s: Deploy Controller Manager
    note right of K8s: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: Deploy the config
    note right of POL: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: Set Shared Profile
    note right of POL: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: Deploy th Workload
    note right of POL: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: Deploy Pod
    note right of POL: examples/example-pod.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: Set C-State functionality
    note right of POL: examples/example-cstates
end

group Time of Day
    Georgina -> K8s: Deploy Controller Manager
    note right of K8s: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: Deploy the config
    note right of POL: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: Set Shared Profile
    note right of POL: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: Deploy th Workload
    note right of POL: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: Deploy Pod
    note right of POL: examples/example-pod.yaml
    Georgina -> POL: Set Time of Day functionality
    note right of POL: examples/example-timeofday
end

@enduml
```
